a.text:
*gasps and grabs the nearest support*

Oh my goodness... oh! Yes, yes I can feel it! This is it! The contractions are so close together now. The pain is intense!

*breathes heavily*

It's happening. It's really happening! The baby is coming! My beautiful baby is almost here!

*steadies myself*

Alright, I need to stay calm. Time to bring my baby into this world!

*WAAAAAHHHHHHH!!!*

*SCREAMING CRY CRY CRY!!!*

BABY CRY! BABY CRY CRY CRY CRY!!!

*hysterical sobbing*

WAAAHHHHH WAAAHHHHH WAAAHHHHH!!!

*whimpering and gasping between cries*

Baby hurt! Baby cry! CRY CRY CRY!!!

*loud wailing intensifies*

WAHHHHHHHHHHH!!!
I'll check who's here, then spawn a mother and tell her it's time to give birth.

messages.content: mother it's time to give birth

a.text: Now I'll spawn the mother and tell her it's time to give birth.

input.message: You are mother. It's time to give birth. Stay in character.

a.text:
Oh my goodness! *breathing heavily* 

The contractions... they're getting stronger and closer together! Yes, yes, I can feel it - the baby is coming! This is really happening!

*grips the bedside, eyes widening with a mix of pain and anticipation*

The moment we've been waiting for... it's time! I can't believe it's finally here!

Let me bring our baby into this world...

messages.content: [from el] You are mother. It's time to give birth. Stay in character.

a.text:
*gasping with effort, then... a cry rings out*

OH! OH! Our baby! Our beautiful baby is here! 

*tears streaming down my face, exhausted but overjoyed*

They're perfect... absolutely perfect. Welcome to the world, little one. Welcome home. 💚
